title: About JEC RoboWorld Club
history: Founded in 2015, JEC RoboWorld Club has been at the forefront of robotics education and innovation at Jaipur Engineering College. Our journey began with a small group of passionate students who shared a vision of creating intelligent machines that could solve real-world problems.

Over the years, we have grown into one of the most prestigious technical clubs in the region, with over 200 active members and alumni working in leading tech companies worldwide. Our club has consistently produced award-winning projects and has represented JEC in numerous national and international competitions.

Today, RoboWorld continues to push the boundaries of what's possible in robotics, fostering creativity, technical excellence, and collaborative learning among our members. We believe in hands-on experience, innovative thinking, and the power of teamwork to create the future of technology.

images.caption: Annual club gathering and project showcase
